title: High-Growth Gutters Services Franchise | $1.35M Rev | Semi-Absentee
description:
This growing gutter services business operates in Alameda County, California and is part of a well-established national franchise within the recession-resilient home services sector. The company specializes in gutter installation, repair, and related exterior services, offering a compelling opportunity with strong cash flow, protected territories, and minimal day-to-day owner involvement.

Established in 2024, the business has experienced rapid growth, generating $1,356,561 in gross revenue and $162,890 in net income in 2025. A full-time owner-operator could realize over $200,000 in seller’s discretionary earnings, while the current owner spends only 10–15 hours per week, making this opportunity suitable for both investors and hands-on operators.

The operation includes six protected franchise territories, extensive equipment, inventory, and goodwill. It is fully staffed with nine trained employees, allowing the business to operate largely absentee. Operations are highly systematized, with sales managed through a CRM, financials maintained in QuickBooks, and strong franchisor support including national branding, marketing programs, call center services, and ongoing operational guidance. The business operates under an existing RMO arrangement, meaning no contractor’s license is required by the buyer, and the license will remain with the business to ensure continuity. With clean financials, turnkey operations, and continued growth during the sale process, this is an attractive opportunity for buyers seeking a scalable, proven gutter services franchise.

Interested parties should complete the contact form to receive confidentiality documentation and detailed financial information. Financing assistance and transition support are available to qualified buyers.

Ad#:2467172
